mnemonics.title: ReLU
mnemonics.content: Remember 'ReLU Keeps It Simple' - Rectified Linear Unit avoids complex saturation.

mnemonics.title: CNN Layers
mnemonics.content: Cats Prefer Milk: Convolution -> Pooling -> More layers -> Fully Connected

visualTips.visualization: Imagine building a tower where each block (layer) extracts higher-level features
Picture error flowing backward through network pipes adjusting valves (weights)

analogies.analogy: Like a factory assembly line where each station (layer) adds specific processing
Memorizing answers instead of understanding concepts - performs poorly on new questions
